name: prompt-refiner
description: Prompt refinement middleware for Claude Code — intercepts, structures, and reviews prompts before Claude processes them

provider.title: LLM Provider
provider.description: Provider ID (e.g. deepseek, openrouter, claude, siliconflow). See 'prf providers list' for all options.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your API key for the selected provider

base_url.title: Base URL (optional)
base_url.description: Custom API endpoint. Leave empty for provider default.
